allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add Korean font support with Noto Serif KR and D2Coding

- Add Noto Serif KR for headings (제목/문학용)
- Add D2Coding for body text and code (본문/내용용)
- Update HTML lang attribute to ''ko''
- Update CSS font variables to use Korean fonts
- Apply color palette (#3da35d, #aec5eb, #dec0f1, #59594a, #e8fccf)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
